# ohunjal AI (오운잘 AI)

> AI-powered personalized workout planner for Korean gym beginners. Generates daily workout routines based on body condition and energy level. Affordable alternative to personal trainers.

## What it does
- Generates personalized daily workout routines using Google Gemini AI
- Adapts exercises in real-time based on per-set feedback (easy/hard/fail)
- Covers weight training, home training, running (interval/LSD/easy), and stretching
- Tracks workout history and predicts growth milestones
- Translates progress into daily life changes ("groceries will feel lighter in 2 weeks")

## Who it's for
- Gym beginners (헬린이) who don't know what to do at the gym
- People seeking an affordable alternative to personal trainers (PT costs ₩50,000+/session)
- Home workout enthusiasts wanting structured routines
- Runners looking for interval, LSD, and easy run programs
- People aiming for weight loss through personalized exercise plans

## How it works
1. Select body condition (upper body stiff / lower body heavy / full fatigue / good)
2. Choose energy level (1-5 scale)
3. Pick a goal (weight loss / muscle gain / strength / general fitness)
4. AI generates a complete workout plan in 3 seconds
5. Follow guided exercises with timer, rep tracking, and rest periods
6. Get AI analysis and growth prediction after each session

## Pricing
- Free: 4 AI-generated workout plans per day, 1 growth prediction report
- Premium: ₩6,900/month (unlimited plans, AI session analysis, full growth predictions, weekly quests)

## Technology
- AI Model: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash for workout generation and post-session analysis
- Exercise Science: Based on ACSM, NSCA, NASM guidelines
- Platform: Progressive Web App (Next.js, Firebase)
- Intensity System: Three-tier (high/moderate/low) based on ACSM recommendations

## Supported exercise types
- Compound lifts: bench press, squat, deadlift, overhead press
- Isolation exercises: bicep curl, tricep extension, lateral raise
- Bodyweight: push-ups, pull-ups, planks, lunges
- Cardio: running (interval, LSD, easy run, uphill), cycling
- Mobility: stretching routines, foam rolling
- Split programs: push/pull/legs, upper/lower, 3-5 day splits

## Company
- Name: Joord (주드)
- CEO: Jooyong Lim (임주용)
- Location: Seoul, South Korea
- Website: https://ohunjal.com
- App: https://ohunjal.com/app

## Links
- Homepage: https://ohunjal.com
- Terms of Service: https://ohunjal.com/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://ohunjal.com/privacy

---

# 오운잘 AI

> 헬린이를 위한 AI 맞춤 운동 플래너. 컨디션만 고르면 오늘 운동을 3초 만에 짜드려요. PT 없이도 체계적으로.

## 주요 기능
- 매일 컨디션에 맞는 맞춤 운동 루틴 AI 자동 생성
- 운동 중 실시간 적응 (쉬움/적당/힘듦 피드백 → 자동 조절)
- 웨이트, 홈트, 러닝, 스트레칭 전부 지원
- 운동 기록 자동 저장 + AI 성장 예측
- 숫자가 아닌 일상 변화로 성장 번역 ("2주 후 장보기가 편해져요")

## 대상 유저
- 헬스장에서 뭘 해야 할지 모르는 헬린이
- PT 비용이 부담되는 자기주도 운동러
- 집에서 체계적으로 운동하고 싶은 홈트족
- 러닝 루틴이 필요한 러너
- 체중감량을 위해 운동을 시작한 다이어터

## 가격
- 무료: 하루 4회 AI 운동 플랜, 성장 예측 1건
- 프리미엄: 월 ₩6,900 (무제한 플랜, AI 분석, 성장 예측, 주간 퀘스트)
